ocr_findings.description: Chapter tab label '第5章 システム戦略' appears as a vertical side-bar in the image; OCR captured it as a standalone line at the top which is acceptable.
Answer key line '問題5-9 ア　問題5-10 ウ　問題5-11 イ' is present and correctly reproduced in OCR.

reviewer_notes: Page contains three numbered exam questions (5-9, 5-10, 5-11) with ア/イ/ウ/エ choices plus answer key and explanations section (解答・解説). All question stems, answer choices, answer key letters, and explanation prose faithfully reproduced. Label correctly identified as exam.
